requirements.text: Introduce explicit planning loop and planning_build between documentation and implementation.
Make gateway a pure build validator.
Represent cycles as build attempts with supersedes/policy/evidence metadata.
Make feedback diff and agent assessment first-class handoff evidence.
Keep graph as lean hot state machine/index and expose requirement traceability gaps.
Align implementation with TDD/test-design evidence mapped to requirements.

evidence_mapping.evidence: TASK-073 acceptance criteria and code_paths include build writer, schemas, graph, state builders, lint, and tests.

evidence_mapping.criterion: TASK-073 covers gateway and TDD evidence alignment.
evidence_mapping.evidence: TASK-073 acceptance criteria include pure gateway semantics and TDD/test-design evidence mapping.

summary: Plan TASK-073 implementation for planning_build, cycle metadata, pure gateway validation, graph traceability, and freshness fixes.
task_changes: TASK-073 created/refined for planning_build, cycle metadata, gateway semantics, traceability, and freshness implementation.
roadmap_changes: TASK-073 created/refined for planning_build, cycle metadata, gateway semantics, traceability, and freshness implementation.
tdd_plan: Add smoke coverage for planning_build creation and implementation builds consuming planning builds.
Extend graph reconciliation tests to cover documentation->planning routing and traceability gaps.
Extend drift propagation tests so spec-only content edits stale revision anchors.
